name: Stop Sleep Go Inc.
summary: Interactive Multi-Media Auction Corporation operates a Website that provides online vacation accommodation booking service in the Philippines. The company offers StopSleepGo, an online platform that allows visitors find and book various places and private accommodations for family vacations, business trips, and romantic getaways worldwide. It also enables hosts to earn income by listing and renting out their rooms, cabins, shared apartments, penthouse, or accommodations of various kinds. The company was formerly known as Stop Sleep Go Limited and changed its name to Interactive Multi-Media Auction Corporation in October 2016. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in London, United Kingdom.
